title: Custodia carceris
description: This set of resources changes your axes when renamed "Custodia carceris" to a mace.
body:
This set of resources changes your axes when renamed "Custodia carceris" to a mace.
![Mace in the left hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56395361b07de729e59a3371558ef8560a3ccde3.png)![Mace in the right hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b97cee3ccb3bef974cbbcf8f7c226790d3cd17c.png)
